name: Lumpia
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Fresh bean sprouts, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely mince the peeled shrimp, bean sprouts, and water chestnuts.
2. Heat the shortening in a pan. Sauté the dried onion until fragrant.
3. Add the ground pork and seasoning (salt, pepper, and MSG). Cook until the pork is thoroughly cooked through.
4. Drain the excess fat from the pork mixture.
5. Add the minced shrimp, water chestnuts, chopped green onions to the pork mixture.
6. Stir in the egg until well combined.
7. To wrap: Place about 1 tablespoon of meat mixture near one corner of a won ton wrapper. Fold the corner over the filling, then fold the side corner toward the center. Fold the last corner over to form an envelope. Dampen the edges with egg white for sealing.
8. Fry the wrapped Lumpia in 1 inch of shortening until golden brown.
From: Earl Shelsby
